cedict_en: the top and bottom of sth/the full vertical extent of sth; from top to bottom/to go up and down/before and after (as in 上下文[shang4 xia4 wen2] "context")/(used after a quantity) approximately; ... or so/(in a social hierarchy) the high and the low; seniors and juniors (as in 上下和睦[shang4 xia4 he2 mu4] "harmony between superiors and subordinates")/all members of a group (as in 舉國上下|举国上下[ju3 guo2 shang4 xia4] "the entire nation")/relative superiority (as in 不相上下[bu4 xiang1 shang4 xia4] "evenly matched")
to flee from sth/to run away/to escape
to purchase or acquire in bulk or at an official level (esp. by a state or organization)/to acquire or take over (a company or equity); acquisition; takeover
guqin 古琴[gu3 qin2] (a type of zither)/musical instrument in general/variant of 琴[qin2], guqin or zither
early period; early phase; early stage
to compensate for loss/to indemnify/to suffer a financial loss
